episode.title: MTG Fast Finance 350: Is WoTC Ruining Magic w/ Jason Alt
episode.description: Catch up on all the latest in MTGFinance as the guys walk us through the weekly MTGO meta, Fast Movers and Cards to Watch. Jason Alt joins the cast for his first guest host appearance and a nuanced discussion of the Bank of America Hasbro downgrade through the lens of Magic the Gathering brand management.
